=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_reuse.ts ---
// refactor: 15:18-15:26
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

type User = {
  id: number
  name: string
}

const MyUserSchema = Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.Number,
  name: Schema.String
})

export interface pipe(AppState) {
  users: User
}


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Generate Effect.Schema from type" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_reuse.ts ---
// refactor: 15:18-15:26
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

type User = {
  id: number
  name: string
}

const MyUserSchema = Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.Number,
  name: Schema.String
})

export const AppState = Schema.Struct({
    users: User
});

export interface AppState {
  users: User
}


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Generate Schema.Class from type" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_reuse.ts ---
// refactor: 15:18-15:26
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

type User = {
  id: number
  name: string
}

const MyUserSchema = Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.Number,
  name: Schema.String
})

export class AppState extends Schema.Class<AppState>("AppState")({
    users: User
}) {}

export interface AppState {
  users: User
}


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Refactor to Schema (Recursive Structural)" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_reuse.ts ---
// refactor: 15:18-15:26
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

type User = {
  id: number
  name: string
}

const MyUserSchema = Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.Number,
  name: Schema.String
})

export class AppState extends Schema.Class<AppState>("AppState")({
    users: MyUserSchema
}) {}

export interface AppState {
  users: User
}
